exploration_notes: The log segment and index architecture in apache/kafka is primarily in storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/. Key files: LogSegment.java is the core segment class; LogSegments.java manages the collection of segments; AbstractIndex.java is the base for all index types; OffsetIndex.java and TimeIndex.java implement offset-to-position and time-to-offset index file formats; TransactionIndex.java tracks aborted transactions per segment; LogConfig.java holds topic/log-level con
